commit_scope: Add a bounded Form lowerer from canonical committed-turn receipt text into code-tool-learning receipt cells, raising the fourth-kernel code-learning floor to 1048575.

commands.output: Prompt guide passed on branch codex/form-code-receipt-jsonl-lowerer-20260616; blocking_risk_count=0.

phase_gate.reason: Local four-way floor is complete; PR CI and deployment validation are pending. This is a bounded committed-turn receipt-text lowerer, not a general JSON parser.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/code-tool-learning.fk -> ctl-jsonl-text-* bounded extraction helpers and receipt-text-to-cell lowerer
form/form-stdlib/tests/code-tool-learning-band.fk -> 1048575 four-way proof including canonical text lowering
docs/coherence-substrate/code-tool-learning.form -> floor and north star aligned to bounded receipt-text lowerer
docs/coherence-substrate/INDEX.md -> sister node summary aligned to the 1048575 floor

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Canonical committed-turn receipt text can lower into a code-tool-learning receipt cell and then validate as the same native coding-act row across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu.
public_endpoints: not-applicable: Form floor and fourth-kernel validation only
test_flows: Construct canonical committed-turn receipt text carrying source_surfaces, patch_recipe, verifiers, choice_receipt, and learned_delta fields.
Lower the text through ctl-jsonl-text-receipt-cell into a receipt-cell row.
Validate that the lowered cell becomes a valid coding-act sample with raw_patch_retained=0 and trust_after=74.
Require code-tool-learning verdict 1048575 on all four kernels.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: code-tool-learning-band proved receipt-cell ingestion at 524287 four-way, but canonical receipt text still had no bounded Form lowerer into that cell.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: code-tool-learning-band proves 1048575 four-way, adding bounded text extraction from canonical committed-turn receipt text into the substrate receipt cell and then into the coding-act row.
not_claimed: live Mac binary interception of agent tool/reasoning calls
default routing of important coding flows to Form-native candidates
